data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. BETTER CALL is a promising dog in the frame at 22 of 43 starts including 10 wins and was in the minors again latest (30.17) over 520m at Q Parklands. Solid record here at this trip including three wins. Drawn wide but with a clean break will be tough to beat again. 4. TARAWI BUSTER goes very well this course and distance starting 19 times for eight wins and nine minors. Placed last time (18.72) at Q Straight in a OPEN, finishing second and beaten 1.5 lengths. Looks a key chance on best figures. 1. COUSIN HENRY looks close to another win after finishing third last time (18.78) at Q Straight. Goes very well from this draw with five wins and five minor placings from 11 starts. Racing well and deserves a win. 7. SIR BAREFOOT cannot be ruled out.","runners":[8,4,1,7],"exclusive":false}
